---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command you ran (e.g. `./spawn.sh ubuntu test1`, `agent.py "..."`)
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- Host OS / kernel:
- QEMU version (`qemu-system-x86_64 --version`):
- Target: `win11` / `ubuntu`
- Provider + model (e.g. anthropic / claude-opus-4-8, openai / gpt-5):
- Boxcar commit (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`):

## Logs / screenshots

Paste relevant output. For provisioning issues, attach `C:\provision.log`
(Windows) or the install log. Redact any API keys.
